race.comment: WILD THOUGHTS (1) finished third but was beaten a long way when stretched to 1900m at Newcastle last start. Has two wins from three runs over today's course and distance. Very fit and can return to form in this more suitable race. GLASTONBURY GIRL (8) has raced twice this prep and been strong through the line over 1400m on each occasion. Won third-up over the mile at Canberra when last in work. Draws much closer today so she looks a huge chance to build on a nice record. OCEAN CHILL (2) led in a new role for her last start and she defied all challengers in a BM74 over 1450m at Muswellbrook. Doubt she will find this any harder so a repeat performance is not out of the question. EMPRESS OF JAPAN (5) warmed up late to grab the minor prize over 1400m here recently. Ready to peak third-up with the blinkers going back on. VELARIS (3) got going late when fresh from a spell over 1300m at Newcastle last time. Can make his mark over an extra 200m this afternoon.
